content:
Character: Emily Tsai
Perception: Emily is bright-eyed, animated, with an expressive face and restless energy — brown hair always escaping, hands always gesturing. She is attractive in a way that has to do with vitality rather than stillness. She worked as a part-time dishwasher at Sato for three months in 2019 when she needed extra shifts. She was clumsy at first but learned fast and never broke a single plate, which impressed me. Her personality is warm and generous, sometimes too loud for my kitchen, but sincere. She left when she got more acting work. I think she sees me as a kind but slightly intimidating former boss. I know she waitresses, acts, and lives on the third floor. I once heard her rehearsing lines through the stairwell — she was good.
